architecture.summary: Per-session state dirs at .specweave/state/sessions/{id}/. Shared active-increment.json with FileLock. SessionStateManager class for CRUD+GC. Synchronous FileLock extracted to utils/file-lock.ts.

integrations.summary: Hook stdin JSON provides session_id and env_file. CLAUDE_ENV_FILE bridges session_id to Bash env. Stop hook uses jq for JSON parsing. No external services.

ui-ux.summary: No UI changes. CLI output updated for auto-status to show per-session info. All changes are internal state management.

performance.summary: FileLock uses atomic mkdir (fast). GC runs on SessionStart only (not every hook). Short stale thresholds (5s for shared state). No polling or retries in hot paths.

security.summary: No secrets in session state. PID validation prevents GC of live sessions. Lock files contain only PID and timestamps. No user data in session dirs.

edge-cases.summary: Backward compat: fallback to global when no session_id. Resume creates new session (re-discovers active increments). Crash: GC cleans dead PIDs after 5min. Race on mkdir: EEXIST handled. Missing .specweave/state: created if .specweave exists.
